styleProfiles.name: cinematic
styleProfiles.label: 🎬 Cinematic
styleProfiles.style: cinematic, ultra detailed, 4K, natural lighting, volumetric fog, dynamic camera movement, shallow depth of field, filmic color grading

styleProfiles.name: documentary
styleProfiles.label: 📹 Dokumentär
styleProfiles.style: documentary style, handheld camera, natural lighting, realistic colors, subtle camera motion, real-world look

styleProfiles.name: stylized
styleProfiles.label: 🎨 Stylized
styleProfiles.style: stylized, vivid colors, high contrast, expressive lighting, artistic exaggeration, bold composition

shotTypes.Extreme wide shot: extreme wide shot, environment-focused, small subject, establishing scale.
shotTypes.Wide shot: wide shot, full body, environment visible, balanced framing.
shotTypes.Medium shot: medium shot, waist-up, focus on subject, natural perspective.
shotTypes.Close-up: close-up, strong focus on face or detail, shallow depth of field.
shotTypes.Extreme close-up: extreme close-up, tiny detail, intense focus.
shotTypes.POV: POV shot, immersive perspective, handheld motion.
shotTypes.Over-the-shoulder: over-the-shoulder shot, subject framed from behind another person.

lightingSetups.3-point lighting: soft key light 45°, gentle fill, subtle rim light, natural contrast.
lightingSetups.High-contrast noir: hard key light, deep shadows, minimal fill, strong rim light.
lightingSetups.Soft cinematic: large soft key, soft fill, subtle back light, low contrast.
lightingSetups.Neon reflections: neon practicals, reflections on wet surfaces, rim light, volumetric fog.
lightingSetups.Stage/Arena: strong spotlights, backlights, haze, moving beams, high contrast.

colorPipelines.Kodak 2383: Kodak 2383 film emulation, soft halation, fine grain, warm highlights, cool shadows.
colorPipelines.Fuji Eterna: Fuji Eterna profile, low contrast, natural skin tones, soft colors.
colorPipelines.Teal-Orange: teal-orange grade, strong color separation, cinematic contrast.
colorPipelines.Log + LUT: log gamma capture, film LUT, gentle contrast curve.
